system.description: Red Ru-Fish Meat: Eating the flesh of a Red Ru-Fish protects against insects for 24 hours. Insects will not bite or attack anyone who has eaten such a creature. This also cures conditions like lice and scabies.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 2: Rules
system.effects: Insects do not bite or attack; cures conditions such as lice and scabies.
